opening.line: I've been looking for one of these! What's your price?
Ah, excellent quality! How much are you asking?
I heard good things about this shop. What will this cost me?
Perfect, I've been needing this. Name your price!
Oh this is exactly what I need. How much?
Hmm, I might be interested. What are you asking for it?
I suppose I could use one of these. What's the price?
Let's see what you want for this...
I've seen better, but it'll do. What's the cost?
I'm not made of gold, you know. What do you want for it?
This better be worth my time. How much?
Fine, fine. What are you charging?
I've had a rough week. Don't fleece me. Price?
I'll hear your price, but don't get greedy.

rejection.line: Ha! That's a bit steep, friend. Try again.
I don't think so. I know what this is worth.
That price feels a little ambitious, don't you think?
Hmm, not quite. I was expecting something more reasonable.
I appreciate the confidence, but no. Come down a little.
Still too much. I'm losing patience here.
You're testing my goodwill. Lower the price.
I've seen this same item cheaper down the road.
That's not going to work for me. Last chance to be reasonable.
You're pushing it. I won't wait forever.
This is my final offer consideration. Don't waste my time.
One more ridiculous price and I'm walking out.
I'm about to leave. Is that really the best you can do?
I'm already halfway to the door. Make it worth my while.
Last chance. My patience has run out.

walkaway.line: Forget it. I'll find a better deal elsewhere.
You clearly don't want my business. Good day.
What a waste of time. I'm leaving.
I can't believe I waited this long. Goodbye.
Your prices are highway robbery. I'll shop somewhere else.
I hope your other customers are more patient than me.

success.line: Now THAT is a fair price. You've made a friend today!
Wonderful! I'll be back again soon at these prices.
Excellent! A pleasure doing business with you.
Ha! My lucky day. Thank you, shopkeeper!
This is exactly what I needed. You've earned my loyalty!
Agreed. You drive a hard bargain, but a fair one.
That works for me. Thank you.
Fine. I need it more than I need my coin apparently.
You got me. Don't expect me to recommend you to friends.
Robbery, but I'll take it. Don't push your luck next time.
I paid too much and we both know it. Good day.
Take my gold then. I'll remember this price.
